title: Narrative claims remain evidence-backed and current
summary: Mission, difference, proof, hierarchy, audiences, and message lengths share one traceable truth model.
guidance: Link factual claims to scoped, owned, dated evidence and preserve qualifiers in every approved adaptation.
do: Separate durable narrative from perishable product facts
Expire claims when their evidence expires
dont: Reuse historical metrics from a brand case study
verification: Claim-to-source traceability, freshness checks, contradiction scan, and locale review
